text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you so much for the wonderful
birthday present. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You're very welcome! I had fun too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Did you really like it, though? Was playing
catch together actually a good gift?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course. It had been such a long time. It
reminded me of our childhood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, I used to ask you to come outside and play
all the time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We'd play catch and tag... You know, I learned so
much from you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
And it's no different now that we're at the
academy. It's just that now, your lessons are on
how to seize victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'd better keep up my running skills to set a good
example then! Let's both train hard, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and I'll continue to practice my throwing. I
want to be able to reach you without bouncing
the ball.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I'd be happy to practice that all you want!
